base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wallmaster_crawl_grab — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Wallmaster — skeletal hand emerging from wall. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wallmaster — skeletal hand emerging from wall; 3-frame: shadow-approach / hand-extend / grab-Link. Teleports Link back to dungeon entrance on grab
